raw_sql:
SELECT 
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS pct_of_total,
    COUNT(DISTINCT assigned_to) AS unique_assignees,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600), 1) AS avg_resolution_hrs
FROM flag_1
WHERE category IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY incident_count DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * ?n / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), ?n) AS pct_of_total,
    COUNT(DISTINCT assigned_to) AS unique_assignees,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n), ?n) AS avg_resolution_hrs
FROM flag_1
WHERE category IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY incident_count DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY category), 2) AS pct_within_category,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY assigned_to), 2) AS pct_of_assignee_total
FROM flag_1
WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to, category
ORDER BY category, incident_count DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * ?n / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY category), ?n) AS pct_within_category,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * ?n / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY assigned_to), ?n) AS pct_of_assignee_total
FROM flag_1
WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to, category
ORDER BY category, incident_count DESC;

predicates: ((category IS NOT NULL) AND (assigned_to IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
SELECT
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS total_incidents,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category = 'Hardware' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hardware_count,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category = 'Hardware' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS hardware_pct,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS pct_of_all_incidents,
    MAX(COUNT(*)) OVER () - COUNT(*) AS gap_from_busiest
FROM flag_1
WHERE assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY total_incidents DESC;
template:
SELECT
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS total_incidents,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS hardware_count,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) * ?n / COUNT(*), ?n) AS hardware_pct,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * ?n / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), ?n) AS pct_of_all_incidents,
    MAX(COUNT(*)) OVER () - COUNT(*) AS gap_from_busiest
FROM flag_1
WHERE assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY total_incidents DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN priority = '1 - Critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS p1_critical,
    SUM(CASE WHEN priority = '2 - High' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS p2_high,
    SUM(CASE WHEN priority = '3 - Moderate' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS p3_moderate,
    SUM(CASE WHEN priority = '4 - Low' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS p4_low,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN ('1 - Critical','2 - High') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS high_critical_pct
FROM flag_1
WHERE assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY high_critical_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN priority = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS p1_critical,
    SUM(CASE WHEN priority = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS p2_high,
    SUM(CASE WHEN priority = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS p3_moderate,
    SUM(CASE WHEN priority = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS p4_low,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN priority IN (?s,?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) * ?n / COUNT(*), ?n) AS high_critical_pct
FROM flag_1
WHERE assigned_to IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY high_critical_pct DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    assignment_group,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category = assignment_group THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS matched,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category != assignment_group THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS mismatched,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category != assignment_group THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS mismatch_pct,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS pct_of_total
FROM flag_1
WHERE assignment_group IS NOT NULL AND category IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assignment_group
ORDER BY total DESC;
template:
SELECT
    assignment_group,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category = assignment_group THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS matched,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category != assignment_group THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS mismatched,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN category != assignment_group THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) * ?n / COUNT(*), ?n) AS mismatch_pct,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * ?n / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), ?n) AS pct_of_total
FROM flag_1
WHERE assignment_group IS NOT NULL AND category IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assignment_group
ORDER BY total DESC;

predicates: ((assignment_group IS NOT NULL) AND (category IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
SELECT
    category,
    assignment_group,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count
FROM flag_1
WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND assignment_group IS NOT NULL
  AND (assignment_group = 'Service Desk' OR category = 'Inquiry / Help')
GROUP BY category, assignment_group
ORDER BY category, incident_count DESC;
template:
SELECT
    category,
    assignment_group,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count
FROM flag_1
WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND assignment_group IS NOT NULL
  AND (assignment_group = ?s OR category = ?s)
GROUP BY category, assignment_group
ORDER BY category, incident_count DESC;

predicates: ((category IS NOT NULL) AND (assignment_group IS NOT NULL) AND ((assignment_group = 'Service Desk'::text) OR (category = 'Inquiry / Help'::text)))

raw_sql:
SELECT
    category,
    assignment_group,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM flag_1
WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND assignment_group IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category, assignment_group
ORDER BY category, cnt DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    category,
    state,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY category), 1) AS pct_in_category
FROM flag_1
WHERE category IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category, state
ORDER BY category, cnt DESC;
template:
SELECT
    category,
    state,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * ?n / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY category), ?n) AS pct_in_category
FROM flag_1
WHERE category IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category, state
ORDER BY category, cnt DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    category,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)::date AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM flag_1
WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category, month
ORDER BY month, cnt DESC;
template:
SELECT
    category,
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)::date AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM flag_1
WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category, month
ORDER BY month, cnt DESC;

predicates: ((category IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))
